title: JiraExpressionValidationError
description:
Details about syntax and type errors. The error details apply to the entire expression, unless the object includes:

 *  `line` and `column`
 *  `expression`

column.description: The text column in which the error occurred.

expression.description: The part of the expression in which the error occurred.

line.description: The text line in which the error occurred.

message.example: !, -, typeof, (, IDENTIFIER, null, true, false, NUMBER, STRING, TEMPLATE_LITERAL, new, [ or { expected, > encountered.
